channel.title: AMA: Ask Me Anything (English)
channel.description: The best Reddit r/AMA threads transformed into AI-powered audio podcasts.
channel.itunes:author: zoobidoo
channel.itunes:summary: The best Reddit r/AMA threads transformed into AI-powered audio podcasts.

item.title: AMA: $100,000 a Year as a Professional Human Guinea Pig
item.description: This clinical trial discussion focuses on a professional 'human guinea pig' who makes over $100,000 annually by participating in medical trials. Key points include compensation, safety protocols, and the reality of testing tomorrow's drugs.
item.itunes:author: zoobidoo
